materialization_method: Repaired repo-local dsqgen with COUNT=1, QUALIFY=Y, SCALE=1, DIALECT=ansi using a temporary /tmp directory containing query77a.tpl and ansi.tpl; source.sql applies only PostgreSQL witness-execution syntax normalization.

source.sql fixes the generated missing comma in the cr CTE projection as PostgreSQL syntax normalization.
